title: cicerbita abietina
intro: Cicerbita abietina, also known as Mountain Everlasting or Alpine everlasting, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cicerbita abietina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Cicerbita abietina is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
